(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention. And very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNOE1mbnN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion... El full esta fresco para descansar a gusto despues de estar de viaje... Los baños muy limpios los use justo despues de que los limpiaran, muy buen trabajo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service... The room is cool and comfortable, perfect for relaxing after a long trip... The bathrooms were very clean; I used them right after they were cleaned—great job!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfNGF2YXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El cafe lo preparan excelente y la atención es sobresaliente. Atentos a todos los detalles. Es un placer desayunar allí.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee is excellent and the service is outstanding. They pay attention to every detail. It's a pleasure to have breakfast there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbm9uRHFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Con reserva de turno muy anticipada y no tenían mis filtros en el box, solo eso deben hacer, tener todo listo para el servis,  poco serios

(Translated by Google)
I booked my appointment well in advance and they didn't have my filters in the service bay; that's all they should do, have everything ready for the service. Very unprofessional.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfaG91ZHVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cómoda , muy buena atención, descuentos para socios del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable, very good service, discounts for ACA members
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfeXVpMEtREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Solo q para el agua caliente para mate, en la máquina dice socio pedir ficha al playero, y el playero me dice q tengo q esperar que abra la full

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. The only issue was that the machine for hot water for mate said "member" to request a token from the attendant, but the attendant told me I had to wait until the full service opened.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfb3F5Q09BEAE

reviews.comment:
El servicio de playa muy bien. Los baños resultan chicos e insuficientes. YPF full redujo el tamaño de los alimentos, los rolls ahora tienen 3/4 partes de lo q eran antes. Si se hacen tres cuadras adentro en panadería Newen se consigue mejor comida y a mejor precio

(Translated by Google)
The beach service was very good. The restrooms are small and insufficient. YPF Full has reduced the portion sizes of the food; the rolls are now three-quarters the size they used to be. If you walk three blocks inland, you can find better food at a better price at the Newen bakery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdklINE5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Tortura. Verano. Horas al sol.  Un solo surtidor por lado. Y encima lento. Cargar en otro lado.

(Translated by Google)
Torture. Summer. Hours in the sun. Only one pump per side. And slow on top of that. Fill up somewhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfekl6dmpnRRAB
